issues.title: Add plan schema contract
issues.body:
Define the plan YAML contract in `src/agent/step_runner/plan.rs`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Schema fields are documented.
- cargo test agent::step_runner passes.

issues.title: Persist session storage migration
issues.body:
Update `.commandagent` session storage after the plan schema contract lands. Touch `src/session/store.rs`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Existing session tests pass.
- cargo test session passes.

issues.title: Improve provider token redaction
issues.body:
Redact API key and token fields in provider logs. Relevant files include `src/providers/openai.rs`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Secrets are not logged.
- cargo test providers passes.
